use_cases: Animated hero section backdrop for landing pages
Site-wide background effect for creative portfolios
Visual enhancement for marketing and SaaS landing pages
ai_summary: A 3D particle animation system that generates multiple colorful particles with randomized properties like color, rotation, and timing. The particles use CSS animations to create a floating effect with varying durations and delays, styled with gradients and transparency in a perspective container for depth. Designed as a reusable component suitable for hero sections and decorative backgrounds.
